meaning: Public source and access matrix for Nipmod API-first package discovery. These are Nipmod-controlled or public source paths, not native third-party integrations.

statusLegend.meaning: The path is usable now through Nipmod controlled code or public source APIs.
The path is live, but durable writes require an authorized Nipmod server writer.

connections.name: Nipmod API
connections.scope: One hosted API for search, inspect, install plan and archive preparation across supported package sources.
connections.proofLevel: API routes are covered by site tests, production monitor checks and live rate-limit headers.
connections.externalDependency: No native platform approval is required to use the hosted API.

connections.name: Package Sources
connections.scope: Resolver coverage for npm, PyPI, GitHub, Hugging Face models, Hugging Face datasets and MCP server listings.
connections.proofLevel: External resolver tests and live synthetic checks validate search, inspect and install-plan responses.
connections.externalDependency: Nipmod reads public source metadata and keeps original owner attribution.

connections.name: Nipmod Archive
connections.scope: Confirmed package records keep source context, Trust Engine v2 factors and receipts. Durable writes require an authorized Nipmod server writer.
connections.proofLevel: Archive prepare, search, confirm dry-run, receipt output and status endpoints are tested. Public verified archive is empty after seed reset.
connections.externalDependency: Durable writes require Nipmod server-side authorization, not third-party approval.

connections.name: MCP
connections.scope: Hosted read-only MCP and local stdio MCP for controlled workspace installs.
connections.proofLevel: Hosted MCP exposes only safe read tools. Local MCP exposes controlled write tools behind approval.
connections.externalDependency: No marketplace approval is required for standard MCP usage.

connections.name: GitHub
connections.scope: Public source mirror, CI surface and developer review path for Nipmod itself.
connections.proofLevel: Main branch, CI and release artifacts are public.
connections.externalDependency: No external approval is required for the Nipmod owned GitHub repo.

connections.name: Gitlawb
connections.scope: Canonical source anchor for Nipmod-owned package publish and claim workflows.
connections.proofLevel: Gitlawb remote sync and Owner Package Claim verification are checked separately.
connections.externalDependency: No external approval is required for the current Nipmod owned Gitlawb source path.

notClaimed: Native platform marketplace approval is not required for API use
Nipmod does not own external npm, PyPI, GitHub, Hugging Face or MCP packages
The empty verified archive does not mean every external source package is verified by Nipmod
Public callers cannot create durable archive records without an authorized Nipmod server writer
